creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, thanks.

Changed a few things:
  - renamed port to match other puppetdb-terminus versions: puppetdb3-terminus -> puppetdb-terminus3
  - Updated PORTNAME accordingly
  - Removed PORTREVISION, it's a new port!
  - Cleanned-up $FreeBSD$, it's a new port!
  - Added conflicts with other ports.
